description: Square 'THE WORST FIRST' card. Background is a high-contrast black-and-white close-up of open hands in metal handcuffs, with a dark gradient on the left. A top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with a white subline '2/11/2025 | Detroit, MI'. A red diagonal corner banner at top-right reads 'DETROIT'. A large bold white sans-serif name at mid-left reads 'Bosko Kablar'. A bold white 'CRIME:' label has a bullet reading 'Homicide'. The bottom-left has a round DHS seal and the white 'ICE' wordmark; the bottom-right has a red box reading '-THE- WORST FIRST'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/11/2025 | Detroit, MI; Bosko Kablar; CRIME: Homicide; DETROIT; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
